data.title: DISCO Appoints Toby Williams to Board of Directors
data.description: DISCO, a prominent litigation technology company traded on NYSE under the symbol LAW, based in Austin, Texas, has recently disclosed the appointment of Toby Williams to its Board of Directors. Toby, the existing President and CEO of Paylocity, a well-established AI SaaS organization, will join the board starting from April 22, 2026. The move was confirmed by Scott Hill, the Chairman of the Board at DISCO, who praised Toby's extensive experience in relevant fields, particularly in AI and public company operations. DISCO is recognized for pioneering solutions in the litigation technology sector.

data.title: EdgeLabs Expands Global Reach Through New Partnership with Stake
data.description: In April 23, 2026, EdgeLabs announced a significant content partnership with Stake, where over 50 games from EdgeLabs' collection will be integrated into Stake's platform. This collaboration will include popular games like Blue Bird Bonus, Diamond 10x, and Mark of Z, as well as casino-style titles such as Emily's Treasure. This partnership aims to diversify Stake's gaming offerings, enhancing its portfolio with EdgeLabs' well-known titles.

data.title: APi Group to Acquire Onyx-Fire Protection Services Inc.
data.description: A company, APi Group Corporation (NYSE: APG), based in New Brighton, Minn., has revealed its acquisition plans. APi has finalized a deal to acquire Onyx-Fire Protection Services Inc., a Canadian company focusing on fire and life safety services with an inspection-first approach. The acquisition is from funds managed by Blackstone Tactical Opportunities. The transaction is set to be completed in the second quarter of 2026, pending standard closing procedures and approval.

data.title: Baozun Releases 2025 Annual Sustainability Report
data.description: Today, in Shanghai, Baozun Inc. (Nasdaq: BZUN, HKEX: 9991), a prominent figure in China's brand e-commerce services sector, published its 2025 Annual Sustainability Report. The report provides an overview of the company's sustainability efforts and achievements over the past year. Baozun is known for being a pioneer in digital commerce solutions and plays a significant role in the industry. The release of the report signifies their commitment to transparency and accountability.

data.title: TrailIntel Acquires GPS Trailmasters Software Platform to Advance Next-Generation Outdoor Navigation
data.description: A major development has occurred that greatly enhances the options for users, offering a more robust, interconnected, and adaptable navigation system on Garmin, Mobile, and Web platforms. This breakthrough is set in STRONG, Maine, on April 23, 2026. TrailIntel, a key player in the industry, is behind this innovation.

data.title: The Missing LINK: Introducing LINK.2.1 and LINK.2.2 from L.A.B. Golf
data.description: L.A.B. Golf has unveiled the newest models, LINK.2.1 and LINK.2.2, which are the first heel-shafted blade putters to incorporate Lie Angle Balance technology. This innovation was introduced on April 23, 2026, in CRESWELL, Oregon. L.A.B. Golf is well-known for its pioneering work in this area, and the latest additions mark a significant advancement in putting technology. These putters offer a distinct design that caters to golfers seeking improved performance on the greens.

data.title: CareScout Joins Ensight™ Intelligent Quote LTC & Life Marketplace
data.description: Ensight, a prominent digital sales acceleration platform specializing in life, long-term care (LTC), and annuity insurance, revealed today that CareScout Care Assurance, the first-ever long-term care insurance offering by CareScout Insurance Company (CareScout), has been integrated into its Intelligent platform. This move signifies a major development for the insurance sector, providing customers with increased access to long-term care coverage. With CareScout Care Assurance now accessible through Ensight's platform, individuals seeking comprehensive insurance solutions can benefit from the advanced features and offerings available. This strategic partnership aims to cater to the growing demand for long-term care insurance, ensuring broader coverage and support for policyholders. The collaboration between Ensight and CareScout underscores their commitment to innovation and enhancing insurance services for clients. This milestone signifies a significant step forward for the industry, leveraging technology to streamline insurance processes and make valuable products more widely available.

data.title: Jack in the Box Announces Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Webcast
data.description: Jack in the Box Inc. (NASDAQ: JACK) has scheduled its JACK Q2 2026 Earnings Webcast for Wednesday, May 13, 2026, at 5 p.m. EDT. The event can be accessed through live webcast at investors.jackinthebox.com. For more information, individuals can contact Rachel Webb, the Vice President of Finance and Investor Relations at (858) 522-4556. The Q2 2026 Earnings Release will be distributed after the market closes on the same day. Additionally, the webcast will be archived on the Jack in the Box investor relations website for future playback.

data.title: Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. First Quarter 2026 Results Webcast Date and Time
data.description: Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO) will conduct a webcast to review its first-quarter results for the period ended March 31, 2026. The webcast is scheduled for Wednesday, May 20, 2026, following the market opening. CEO Luis Raganato and senior management will lead the discussion, starting with introductory comments and then moving on to a Q&A session. The webcast will be accessible to members of the investment community, with Google Chrome being the recommended browser for participation.
